overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character with a mohawk walking through a bustling futuristic urban street. The character walks past neon-lit commercial shops and a long red construction barrier before turning around and walking back. The scene features bright midday sunlight, futuristic vehicles, and dense cyberpunk architecture with holographic advertisements.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past commercial storefronts including a wash shop and food market

notable_agents.action: man in red pants walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: storefront with blue neon signage and dark entrance
market with yellow signage and cartoon mascot character
futuristic cars and trucks driving on the multi-lane street
tall buildings with holographic advertisements and neon signs

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a bustling cyberpunk city sidewalk with neon-lit shops on the left and moderate traffic on the right. The Wash & Run shop and All Foods market are prominent storefronts as pedestrians move in various directions and futuristic vehicles pass by on the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction barrier walkway with advertising billboards

events.description: passing from commercial shops into area with continuous red construction wall on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a tall red construction barrier with large advertising posters

entered.detail: tall continuous red barrier wall running along the entire left side of the sidewalk
large digital advertising posters mounted on the construction wall
elevated roadway structure spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower walkway bordered by a long red construction wall on the left covered with advertising billboards. The character continues walking forward as the commercial shops fall behind and an elevated highway structure becomes visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: character executes a 180-degree turn to walk back in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: turning around on the sidewalk to walk back toward the commercial area

segments.scene_description: The character abruptly turns around, shifting the perspective so the red construction wall is now on the right side. The elevated highway disappears from view as the character begins walking back along the same path toward the commercial district.

events.description: exiting construction wall area and re-entering commercial shop district

agents.ego_description: walking back toward the commercial area with shops and neon signs visible ahead

notable_agents.action: child in green shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: storefront with blue neon signage becoming visible ahead on the right
market with yellow signage and cartoon mascot approaching from this direction

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the construction barrier area and returns to the commercial district. The Wash & Run shop and All Foods market come back into view on the right as the character approaches the original starting area, passing pedestrians including a child walking ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling cyberpunk district that transitions from a commercial hub into a restricted construction zone before returning to the city center. It begins by following a character past neon-lit storefronts like the Wash & Run shop and All Foods market, with futuristic vehicles and pedestrians filling the surrounding street. As the character moves forward, the open commercial area narrows into a walkway bordered by a long red construction wall covered in billboards, leading toward a distant elevated highway. The perspective then abruptly shifts as the character turns around, leaving the highway behind and retracing their steps with the red barrier now on the right. Finally, the scene opens back up as the character emerges from the construction zone and returns to the original commercial district, passing a child and the familiar neon shops.
